title: Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of West Bengal

overview.short: The Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary (also just known as the Haliday Wildlife Sanctuary) is one of several wildlife sanctuaries in the nation of India.
overview.description: The Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary (also just known as the Haliday Wildlife Sanctuary) is one of several wildlife sanctuaries in the nation of India. Located in the state of West Bengal, the area is approximately six square kilometers in size. It is a part of the 'Sundarbans Biosphere Reserve', with the Sundarbans region as a whole becoming a 'Biosphere Reserve' officially in 1989. The wildlife-heavy areas there are regarded as an environmentally-minded tourist destination.

topPlaces.name: West Sunderban Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: 'West Sunderban Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary located in the South 24 Parganas district of West Bengal, India. Established on September 11, 2013, it covers an area of 556.45 km2 comprising the Dulibhasani and Chulkati forest blocks in the Sundarbans delta.

items.note: 'West Sunderban Wildlife Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary located in the South 24 Parganas district of West Bengal, India. Established on September 11, 2013, it covers an area of 556.45 km2 comprising the Dulibhasani and Chulkati forest blocks in the Sundarbans delta.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (112 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Haliday Island Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are West Sunderban Wildlife Sanctuary.
